title: Staff Management
searchPlaceholder: Search username, name, email, or phone

currentStore.label: Current store
currentStore.helper: Choose an assigned store to view staff. Only manageable stores can create, edit, disable, or reset passwords.
currentStore.readOnlyHelper: This store is view-only. Staff accounts cannot be changed here.

posPermissions.title: POS Terminal Permissions

unsaved.title: Discard unsaved changes?
unsaved.description: These POS permission changes have not been saved and will be lost if you leave.

restore.title: Restore inherited permissions?
restore.description: This removes the store-specific override and restores inherited POS permissions.

busy.title: Operation in progress
busy.description: Wait for the save or restore to finish before leaving this page.

messages.missingStoreGuid: The store access identifier is missing. Refresh stores or sign in again.
messages.saveFailed: POS permissions could not be saved. Your unsaved selection has been kept.
messages.restoreFailed: Inherited permissions could not be restored. Your current selection has been kept.

errors.invalidDescription: The staff member or store identifier is missing. Open this page again from Staff Management.
errors.unauthorizedDescription: Sign in again before managing POS permissions.
errors.forbiddenTitle: You cannot manage this account's POS permissions
errors.forbiddenDescription: Your account does not have permission for this action, and you cannot change your own POS permissions. The server still validates privileged targets.
errors.notFoundDescription: This POS permission assignment no longer exists. The staff member may have moved stores, been disabled, or been unassigned. Return to Staff Management and refresh.
errors.networkDescription: The server cannot be reached right now. Check your connection and try again.

posPermissions.emptyDescription: The server has no assignable permissions for this staff member and store. You can still restore inheritance while an override is active.

fields.fixedRoleHint: Accounts created here are always staff accounts, assigned to the selected managed store, and set as casual staff.

detail.title: Staff Details
detail.missingDescription: Open a staff profile from Staff Management.

schedule.title: This Week's Schedule
schedule.description: View this staff member's weekly schedule in the detail page instead of leaving for the shared attendance screen.
schedule.loadFailedDescription: The staff schedule could not be loaded right now. Please try again.
schedule.endpointUnavailable: The backend employee schedule endpoint is not available yet. Add the endpoint and try again.

records.title: Recent Records
records.description: Review this staff member's recent punches, leave requests, and approval records.
records.loadFailedDescription: The staff records could not be loaded right now. Please try again.
records.endpointUnavailable: The backend employee records endpoint is not available yet. Add the endpoint and try again.
records.emptyDescription: There are no punches, leave requests, or approvals to show yet.

dialogs.resetPasswordDescription: Set a new password for {{username}}. Share it with this staff member after saving.
dialogs.statusConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to {{action}} {{username}}?

messages.noAccessDescription: The current account cannot view store staff.
messages.selectStoreDescription: Choose a store before viewing or managing staff accounts for that store.
messages.storeReadOnly: This store is view-only. Staff accounts cannot be changed.
messages.loadFailedDescription: Try again later or pull to refresh.
messages.emptyDescription: Add the first staff account for the current store.
messages.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
messages.passwordTooLong: Password must be 100 characters or fewer
messages.saveFailed: Failed to save the staff account.
messages.statusFailed: Failed to update the staff status.
